app.name: The Cube
app.maintenanceMessage: The Cube is temporarily under maintenance. Please try again later.
app.blockedMessage: This version of The Cube is no longer supported. Please install the official version.

update.title: The Cube 2.0.31 is ready
update.message: Install the latest version for Anime, website sync, smoother playback, subtitles, resume fixes, and download export.
releaseNotes: Improved TV Home layout with a framed hero and compact landscape rows
Moved Videasy to the final fallback position
Improved normal Auto quality selection for smoother playback
Added Anime as its own app tab
Fixed Anime API array parsing so poster cards render instead of raw JSON
Routed Anime through a details page with real episode data
Fixed Anime HLS playback through the Aniplay stream proxy
Added Anime stream playback through the Cube player
Synced website Continue Watching and profile picture data
Kept premium status tied to the signed-in donor email
Added temporary streaming cache for smoother HLS playback
Improved subtitle switching without resetting playback
Improved series/anime resume and next episode state handling
Added optional manual export for completed phone downloads
Improved TV player focus so red only marks the focused control

items.title: The Cube 2.0.31
items.message: TV Home, Anime parsing/playback, subtitles, resume, download export, website sync, and player stability have been improved.

items.title: Support The Cube
items.message: Support is optional and helps development. Third-party servers may still go down or return errors.
